# Dungeon Level One (16x16)
# Legend:
# 0 = walkable floor
# 1 = blocked wall/obstacle
# x = blocked border/wall (same collision as 1, easier to read border)
# P = player spawn
# N = friendly NPC spawn
# E = enemy NPC spawn
# S = staircase/exit tile
# i = interactable object marker

1001010000101001

1001111101111001

1000000000100001
1000010000100001
1001010000101001
100001000010N001
1000i00000000001
